title: E-Commerce Support Bot
description: Built a GPT-4 powered customer support chatbot for a mid-size e-commerce brand. Handles order tracking, returns, and product recommendations — reducing support tickets by 62% in the first month.

title: Legal Document Analyzer
description: AI-powered tool that extracts key clauses, flags risks, and summarizes contracts in seconds. Integrated with the firm's existing document management system via secure API.

title: Real Estate Lead Qualifier
description: Automated lead qualification pipeline for a real estate agency. Ingests inquiries from multiple channels, scores leads with AI, and routes hot prospects to agents instantly via Slack.

title: Content Repurposing Engine
description: Takes long-form blog posts and automatically generates social media posts, email newsletters, and Twitter threads — all matching the brand's unique tone of voice.
